_doc: Execution logs end abruptly mid-Delay after exactly 10 minutes — no Job Completed line. Robot Service logs the auto-cancel trigger fire and the abrupt exit. The kill source is recorded as the trigger name.

Data.Message: Job 'c3c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789ccccc' (ReleaseName=LongRunningProcess) ended with unexpected exit code 0x40010004. The executor was terminated externally; no graceful shutdown was performed.
[Robot] Stop request received for job 'c3c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789ccccc' (strategy=Kill, source=Trigger:kill-after-10min, reason=TimeBudgetExceeded). Terminating executor process.
[LongRunningProcess] Starting long-running work — 5 minute delay simulates a slow inference or batch step.
Job 'c3c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789ccccc' (ReleaseName=LongRunningProcess) entering Running state on MOCK-HOST.
